item.name: Porxie King Horn
item.description: Wrought of clay, this horn emits a sound at once regal and soothing that calls the porxie king to your side.

mount.name: Porxie King
mount.action: Summon forth your porxie king. Smells like bacon that's a cut above the rest─though that might just be an effect of the crown.
mount.description: Unlike its kin, this porxie was born without the ability to cure the tempered. Rather than have it go to waste, however, it was made into a mount and given a crown─perhaps to evoke a sense of luxury and comfort.
mount.tooltip:
This specimen can be
considered royalty
among them.
- Martineau
